sentences.english: My ideal weekend is doing absolutely nothing.
sentences.korean: 이상적인 주말은 아무것도 안 하는 거예요.

sentences.english: No plans, no alarms, just rest.
sentences.korean: 계획 없고 알람 없고 그냥 쉬기만요.

sentences.english: I like to be active on weekends — hiking swimming or playing basketball.
sentences.korean: 주말에 활동적으로 보내는 게 좋아요 — 등산 수영 혹은 농구요.

sentences.english: Sitting at home drives me crazy.
My perfect weekend is spending time at a café, reading and people-watching.
sentences.korean: 완벽한 주말은 카페에서 책 읽고 사람 구경하며 보내는 거예요.

sentences.english: It's my favorite way to recharge.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
